# Island

This note deliberately links to nothing and nothing links to it. It exists to be detected as an
orphan by the graph engine. Here is padding text to comfortably exceed the three-hundred character
threshold so that any orphan rule which also cares about note length will still flag this note.
A few more words to be safe and clearly clear the limit for orphan detection in every case.
